mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_ACCOUNT ( user_seq, account_no, cash_balance, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userSeq}, #{accountNo}, #{cashBalance}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT account_seq as accountSeq, user_seq as userSeq, account_no as accountNo, cash_balance as cashBalance, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq}
